function.name: web_search
function.description: Search the web for current information. Use this for any question about news, current events, prices, releases, sports, weather, or any fact that may have changed since your training data or that you are unsure about. Write short keyword queries (2-6 words), like a search engine user, not full sentences. Returns result titles, source URLs, and text snippets.

query.description: Short keyword search query, e.g. 'nobel prize physics 2026 winner'.
